# Parked issue forms — training-mode failsafe

These are the four full-Collective entry forms (memory, ideas, tension, creativity).
GitHub only shows issue forms in the TOP LEVEL of `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`, so parking
them in this subfolder hides them from the New Issue chooser without deleting them.

While Collective is untested, only training mode (the gap-log form) is public. To
re-enable the full system, move these four files back up into `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`
and restore the disabled job condition in `.github/workflows/intake.yml`.
